title: pedilonum subuliferum
intro: Pedilonum subuliferum, also known as the club moss or lycopodium, is a type of perennial plant belonging to the Lycopodiaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Pedilonum subuliferum include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and wounds. Herbal preparations often involve the dried or powdered form of the plant, which can be taken orally or used topically in creams or ointments.
